Very good 👍👌 I'm a bike delivery driver. They have air conditioning for bikes and motorcycles. It's a great idea.

reviews.comment:
Bajaron la cantidad de empleados hay que siempre hacer cola y el bar cierra a la noche para no pagar empleados la verdad el dueño o los dueños un desastre

(Translated by Google)
They reduced the number of employees, you always have to wait in line, and the bar closes at night to avoid paying employees. The truth is, the owner or owners are a disaster.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de parte de los playeros.
Es difícil estacionar, ya que tienen muchos espacios reservados con los típicos conos naranjas. El lavadero es razonable teniendo en cuenta el precio.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very helpful.
Parking is difficult, as they have many spaces reserved with the typical orange cones. The car wash is reasonably priced.
